sources.title: API/code review report contract check
sources.expert_material_preview: API review needs strict JSON report contract, evidence spans, fix specificity, and rejection of overbroad generic findings.

sources.title: Authorization and object access review
sources.expert_material_preview: Authorization review separates authentication, role/scope authorization, object ownership, tenant boundary, and error envelope.

sources.title: Production configuration security check
sources.expert_material_preview: Config review must separate prod from dev/test and verify secrets, TLS, debug state, audit retention, and export sinks.

sources.title: File upload security review
sources.expert_material_preview: Upload review needs content validation, path isolation, non-public storage, and audit retention.
